details: Table 1 of paper 097 (Molecules 2002 7(2):124-128) lists trans-4e mp 183-4 °C; quote is verbatim from Table 1 header row.
Paper 2013_Zhou EPAC2: section header '4-(2,4,6-Trimethylbenzenesulfonyl)phenol (10)' followed by 'desired product (306 mg, 92%) as a white solid (mp 180-181 °C)' confirms value and compound.
Paper 114 (PMC13093879) section for compound 12c states 'Brown solid; yield: 65%; MP = 230–232 °C' — quote verbatim, compound matches.
Paper 181 (PMC10806150) section 2.2.4 for compound 1d: 'White Solid; mp: 147°C–149°C' — quote verbatim.
Paper 092 (PMC6236407, 10.3390/60900784) experimental section for compound 7c-HCl: 'Hydrochloride m.p. 216-219°C' — quote verbatim; compound name (quinazolidin-4(3H)-one) matches paper text.
Paper 062 Table 5 row 52: '2,2-dime-3-pentanol 8.5139 3.0843 136.0 131.1 4.9' — column 'BP (Exp.)' = 136.0 matches; data_type=measured correct (Exp.).
Paper 013 (PMC12943095) section: '2′-bromo-5-methoxy-[1,1′-biphenyl]-2-carbaldehyde ( 1e ). Yield: 68%; Mp: 92 °C;' — quote verbatim, compound matches.
Paper 062 Table 5 row 49: '3,3-dime-2-butanol 7.1667 2.9846 120.0 119.1 0.9' — BP (Exp.) = 120.0 °C; data_type measured correct.
Paper 033 (PMC7148931, 10.1016/j.jscs.2011.04.001) for compound V7: 'Yield, 85%, light brown crystalline solid, mp 201–203 °C' — quote verbatim (en-dash vs ASCII hyphen permitted).
Paper 083 (PMC4058676) compound 5a: 'Dark brown crystals from light petroleum (100–120 °C); m.p. 91–92 °C; yield 90%' — quote verbatim, compound and value match.
Paper fernandes_2018_pyridazine_suzuki section for 3d: 'Yellow solid (28%). Mp: 249–252 °C' — quote verbatim (hyphen folding); compound 3d matches.
Paper 099 (PMC6236343, 10.3390/60300194) experimental section: 'pale yellow crystals, m.p. 137-140 °C' for 3,5-dinitrobenzoyl derivative — quote verbatim.
Paper gemini_2023_il_surfactants_cu2o (10.1039/D3RA04646J) section for 4c: 'imidazol-3-ium) bromide (4c). Oﬀ-white solid, m. p. = 128–130 °' — quote verbatim, compound and value match.
Paper 020 (PMC11206691) compound 58: 'White solid (17.8 mg, 6%). R f = 0.25 (EtOAc/MeOH 3:1), m.p. > 250 °C' — quote verbatim, relation '>' correct.
Paper 021 (PMC10673159) compound 10b: 'Yield: 27% as an off-white solid. mp 116 °C' — quote verbatim, compound name matches the paper's R-quaterphenyl methanone.
Paper 098 (PMC6146883) compound 21: 'Compound 21 was obtained as dark yellow crystals (45%), mp 194°C' — quote verbatim.
Paper 036 (PMC6193216, 10.1055/s-0036-1589496) compound 5d: 'mp 118 °С (dec)' — quote verbatim; data_type 'decomposition' correctly classified.
Paper 038 (PMC6264341) compound 2a: 'mp: 80–82 °C' — quote verbatim; compound 8-(4-((5'-(Methylthio)-2,2'-bithiophen-5-ylthio)methyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-1-yl)octane-1-thiol matches.
Paper 102 (PMC6236359, 10.3390/60400300) compound 6a: 'm.p. 255°C' — quote verbatim, compound 10H-benzo[i]quino[2,3,4-kl]acridin-10-one matches.
Paper 119 (PMC12943680, 10.3390/molecules31040629) for FURL-TB: 'White solid; yield 74.12%; mp: 127.0–127.3 °C' — quote verbatim; midpoint 127.15 °C correct.
Paper 028 (PMC10671214, 10.3390/ijms242216359) compound 11b: 'white powder; mp: 234–235 °C' — quote verbatim, compound name corresponds to dispiro structure.

Paper 090 (PMC6146422, 10.3390/70800681) compound 2k: 'Yield 62 %; M.p.115-117°C' — quote 'M.p.115-117°C' verbatim, compound 3-(2-furanyl)-6-phenyloxymethyl-1,2,4-triazolo[3,4-b]-1,3,4-thiadiazole matches.

Paper liu_2024_matrine_salts_thermal (10.3390/molecules29030567) Section 2 results: '102.90 °C and 140.90 °C, which are between' — quote verbatim; 140.90 °C is the second endothermic peak of MAT-SAL-H2O salt monohydrate. Note: source label says 'Pharmaceuticals' but DOI is in Molecules; DOI identifier matches paper, Q6 passes.
Paper 113 (PMC13103808, 10.1021/acsomega.6c01037) section 2.3.1 for compound 5: 'to afford 6.2 g of white crystals (89%) of 5 , mp 55–56 °C' — quote verbatim, compound matches.

Paper khan_2017_piroxicam_cocrystal Table 2 lists 'Piroxicam-sodium acetate ... 324 (coformer mp)' but the row's evidence_quote 'Piroxicam-sodium acetate ... Melting point coformer 324' is a paraphrase with ellipsis (...) joining tokens that are not adjacent in the paper; this is not a verbatim string. The value 324 °C and data_type=measured are otherwise correct.
